PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-28-2022 Continued To Aug-30-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Herman Johnson, Jr. appeared by zoom in propria persona.
Brian Trowbridge appeared by zoom for and with Belinda Robinson by zoom.

The court noted that Mr. Johnson Senior died 12 years ago, stated that there has been no estate thus far, that the need for his estate is if the real property is not a trust asset, that it is not seeing a sense of urgency and that it is seeing a lot of fighting that it does not care to get in the middle of. The court also stated that the trust matter will probably need to get resolved first, that the probate proceeding needs to be ready to go in the event the trust proceeding is resolved in Mr. Johnson's favor, and informed Mr. Trowbridge that it is not appointing someone on its own motion. In addition, the court stated that if Mr. Trowbridge wants to bring a competing petition to have someone appointed, he needs to do so forthwith, that this matter would still be on hold until the evidentiary hearing in the trust matter and that the probate matter will trail the trust matter. Mr. Trowbridge stated that he currently has a conflict with the trial date in the trust matter, but he hopes to get it resolved. The Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to August 30, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Any petitions for appointment are to be filed before August 15, 2022.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: D. Xiao. Not reported

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-23-2022 Continued To Apr-06-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Herman Johnson, via ZOOM, in propria persona, Petitioner; Brian Trowbridge, via ZOOM, for Belinda Johnson, via ZOOM, Objector.

The court points Mr. Johnson to the fact that a will matching the title of this matter has been deposited and that his initial petition did not include a will. Accordingly, the court summarizes what Mr. Johnson's options are. Mr. Johnson reports that he intends to amend his petition. Mr. Trowbridge advises that his client intends to formally object to Mr. Johnson's petition. Mr. Trowbridge also reports that he has filed a Heggstad petition which is currently set for hearing on Jun-14-2022 in this Dept.

The Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to Apr-06-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. Mr. Johnson is instructed to file his amended petition forthwith and provide proper notice.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: J. Jeung. Not reported.
